privileged_info_summary: The task expects the agent to upload '/home/ga/Documents/pushup_reference.jpg' to the synthetically generated 'Standard Push-up' exercise and set its license to a 'Creative Commons' or 'CC ' option. However, the Wikimedia Commons URL used in setup_task.sh is broken and downloads a 2146-byte HTML error page, which passes the size check and is saved as a .jpg. Since Wger uses Django's ImageField (which validates files via Pillow), attempting to upload this HTML file will result in a form validation error ('Upload a valid image...'), making the task effectively impossible to complete via the UI without the agent generating a valid image itself.
